expectations.text: Uses deno-deploy-classic-migration-wizard.sh as the local checklist or explicitly references the local wizard.
expectations.evidence: Lines 4-5 and many stage headings explicitly reference deno-deploy-classic-migration-wizard.sh and wizard stages.

expectations.text: Maps work to the official migration guide stages such as env vars, domains, HTTP API, cron, queues, and KV.
expectations.evidence: Lines 43-156 cover source inspection, env vars, KV, deploy, custom domains, smoke tests, and decommissioning.

expectations.text: Includes a verification section with commands run or commands that should be run.
expectations.evidence: Lines 208-216 provide a Verification section with observed commands and outcomes.

expectations.text: Clearly marks dashboard-only work separately from agent-editable repository work.
expectations.evidence: Each numbered stage includes a Classification field, and lines 176-188 summarize manual dashboard steps.
